metadata.name: Interactive Streaming Chatbot
metadata.description: Real-time streaming chat with conversation memory
metadata.author: Kaizen Team

outputs.name: Streaming Tokens
outputs.description: Real-time token stream for UI display

documentation.overview: This multi-agent workflow creates an interactive chatbot with real-time token streaming and conversation memory. StreamingChatAgent provides instant user feedback by streaming tokens as they're generated, while MemoryAgent maintains conversation context across turns. Perfect for responsive chat interfaces and conversational AI applications.
use_cases: Customer support chatbots with real-time responses
Interactive virtual assistants with context awareness
Educational tutors with personalized learning paths
Technical support bots maintaining issue context
Conversational interfaces for web and mobile apps
prerequisites: OpenAI API key configured as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
WebSocket or streaming-capable UI for real-time display
Memory storage configured (Redis, database, or in-memory)

example_inputs.user_message: Can you help me debug my Python code?

example_outputs.complete_response: I can help with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing code, analyzing data, and more. What would you like assistance with?
